__commentExample.__comment_itemName: The name of the item the bot should check the stock of, 'THIS IS CASE SENSITIVE!' (This should be the exact name as shown on the terminal store page!)
__commentExample.__comment_desiredStock: The amount of the item that the bot will try to keep in the crew's possession
__commentExample.__comment_overrideEcoLimit: Should we use the eco limit as defined here instead of the one in the Lethal Bots config
__commentExample.__comment_ecoLimit: How much money should the bot keep in reserve when thinking about purchasing this item.
__commentExample.__comment_requiredItems: The following items must be in the crew's possession before the bot will consider restocking this.
__commentExample.__comment_comment: Some examples have been provided, feel free to change them as desired! If you ever want the default file back, just delete this one!
